name: Potato Pancake Bread (Lompe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into small pieces.
2. Boil in their skins until tender.
3. Peel the potatoes once cool enough to handle.
4. Mash with salt, then mix with flour to form a dough (adjust for potato moisture).
5. Form into sausage shapes and cut into lengths.
6. Roll out into thin pancakes about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cook on a hot griddle or frying pan until golden brown.
Yield: Makes 10 to 12 small pancakes
Time: 1 hour
